stories.title: Halle Open Day 2 — Zverev Returns, Shelton vs Kyrgios

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Roland Garros champ Zverev is back — opening at Halle today vs Kopriva on home soil. Stuttgart winner Shelton faces Kyrgios in their FIRST-EVER ATP meeting on the same day. Grass week 2 is here. 🎾 #TerraWortmannOpen #Halle2026 [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Kyrgios got a wild card at Halle and drew Stuttgart winner Shelton in R1. Their first ATP meeting ever — today, on grass, in Germany. 🎾 #TerraWortmannOpen #Halle2026 [URL]

article.headline: Roland Garros Champion Zverev Opens Halle Defense as Shelton Faces Kyrgios in First-Ever ATP Meeting

stories.title: Berlin WTA — 9 of Top 10 in Historic Field

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: Nine of the world's top 10 WTA players are in Berlin this week. Sabalenka, Rybakina, and Gauff all in the same draw — 13 days before Wimbledon. This field is historic. 🎾 #BerlinOpen #WTATennis [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Serena Williams is back in doubles — this time in Berlin with Victoria Mboko, two weeks after their Queen's Club WTA run. And 9 of the world's top 10 are competing in singles. 🎾 #BerlinOpen #WTATennis [URL]

article.headline: Nine of the World's Top 10 WTA Players Convene in Berlin — Sabalenka, Rybakina, Gauff Lead Historic Field

stories.title: Queen's Club ATP Day 2 — de Minaur Opens, Majchrzak vs Lehecka

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Day 2 at Queen's Club: Top seed de Minaur opens vs Diallo. Libema champion Majchrzak faces No. 2 seed Lehecka — first action since his 's-Hertogenbosch title last Sunday. 🎾 #QueensClub #HSBCChampionships [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: 13 days until Wimbledon. Draw June 26. Sinner defending — no grass warm-ups. Alcaraz out. Shelton on fire. Zverev home. Berlin and Halle in week 2. The picture is coming together. 🎾 #Wimbledon2026 #TennisFanrecap [URL]

article.headline: Wimbledon 2026: 13 Days Out, Sinner Defending Without Warm-Up Events, Alcaraz Out
